methods.name: projectionInverse
methods.description: Returns the inverse projection matrix for the camera, given the X and Y aspect. In general these would be set to the width and height of your render. *x - The horizontal aspect ratio. *y - The vertical aspect ratio.

methods.name: projection
methods.description: Returns the projection matrix for the camera, given the X and Y aspect. In general these would be set to the width and height of your render. *x - The horizontal aspect ratio. *y - The vertical aspect ratio.

methods.name: mpcdiRegion
methods.description: Returns a dictionary of its transform and projection for use in a MPCDI definition file. *width - The horizontal resolution of the renderer. *height - The vertical resolution of the renderer.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the CameraCOMP Class wiki page
